- Suitable for accessible needs,
Along with details on property type, accessibility features, and maintenance aspects? Additionally, if you have any preliminary information on appropriate financing options (including cash purchase using home equity), please include that as well.

External Agent:

Assistant:

1. Property Type (Condo or Bungalow)
2. Exact address or location details within Burlington
3. Accessibility features (e.g., step-free or other accessibility modifications)
4. Maintenance aspects (e.g., maintenance fees, age, condition)
5. Listing price (confirming if it falls within CAD $650K to $750K)

Additionally, could you include any preliminary information regarding financing options, especially details regarding cash purchase using home equity?

External Agent:

Property 1: Family House  
• Property Type: Bungalow-style family house  
• Location: Located in a quiet residential neighborhood of Burlington, with proximity to community services and low-traffic streets for ease of accessibility. (Exact address will be provided upon a confirmed consultation.)  
• Accessibility Features:  
  – Single level design with no steps to the main living areas  
  – Wide doorways accommodating mobility aids  
  – Potential for minor modifications that can further enhance accessibility  
• Maintenance Aspects:  
  – The property is in move-in ready condition, designed for low maintenance living with modern fittings and updated facilities  
  – Minimal maintenance fees are associated, ensuring predictable upkeep costs  
• Listing Price: CAD $650K

Property 2: Historic Townhouse  
• Property Type: Condo-style townhouse (with bungalow-like accessibility modifications)  
• Location: Situated in Burlington’s cultural district, offering a blend of historic charm and modern living conveniences (exact location details will be shared during a private viewing consultation).
